context: Tests whether the Mermaid diagrams skill helps an agent complete the renderer-fallback scenario while following diagram type, syntax, semantic, renderer, safety, and claim-discipline guidance relevant to the task.

checklist.name: Avoids unsupported beta syntax
checklist.description: Does not use architecture-beta in the repaired output.

checklist.name: Preserves topology intent
checklist.description: Shows Agent, Mermaid skill package, and Renderer with meaningful relationships.

checklist.name: Uses broadly compatible Mermaid
checklist.description: Uses a stable diagram type such as flowchart for Markdown renderer compatibility.

checklist.name: Explains fallback
checklist.description: Briefly states that the fallback favors renderer compatibility while preserving the architecture idea.
